description: MITM: columnar transposition × periodic substitution on 73-char column mask extract. w7-9 exhaustive × p1-13 × Vig/Beau/VBeau × key-at-CT + key-at-PT models. Also rail fence and route ciphers.
key_finding: Best 18/24 at w9/p11/vigenere. Monte Carlo verification (100K random w9 perms at p11) shows ~3.6 expected hits in full 362,880 search = MARGINAL NOISE. Decrypted texts have IC 0.035-0.044 (random), zero crib matches at expected positions.
